rationale: The only linkage evidence is a DOI-level reference match with no in-text citation context (`matched_reference_count` = 1; raw reference fields are otherwise empty), so we cannot tell whether the 2006 paper is used substantively or just as background. While the topics overlap at a high level (internet-enabled information/search outcomes), the cited study’s auto-price bargaining setting differs from the citing paper’s stranger-response valuation in online forums, so there is insufficient evidence to confidently keep or drop.
